info.name: RIDP Form Platform — Complete API
info.description:
Full API collection organized in the same order as docs/backend-doc/getting-started.md.

Base URL: http://localhost:8051
Swagger: http://localhost:8051/form/docs

Required env variables: base_url, access_token, refresh_token, form_id, section_id, question_id, response_id

Workflow: Health Check → Register → Login → Create Form → Add Sections → Publish → Submit Responses

item.name: 0. Health Check

request.description: No auth required. Returns 200 if backend is up.
No auth required. Returns AI provider status (ollama/openai/local).

item.description: Verify the service is running before anything else.

item.name: 1. Authentication

request.description:
Create a new user account. Rate-limited: 5 per minute.

Save from response: user.id → {{user_id}}
Step 1 of OTP login. Sends OTP to mobile number. Rate-limited: 3 per minute.
Step 2 of OTP login. Provide mobile + OTP from step 1. Same response shape as password login.
Use {{refresh_token}} as Bearer token. Returns new access_token + refresh_token. Do this automatically on 401.

item.description: Start here. Order: Register → Login → save access_token → use in all requests → Refresh when 401.

item.name: 2. User Management

request.description: Returns current user's full profile including roles and org. Also at /user/status.
Rate-limited: 3 per hour. Requires correct current_password.
Requires admin or superadmin role. Returns paginated users in the org.
Requires admin or superadmin role.
Requires admin or superadmin role.
Requires admin or superadmin. Partial update — only include fields to change.
Requires admin or superadmin. Soft-deletes.
Requires admin. Prevents login without deleting account.
Requires admin.

item.description: Self-service profile management and admin CRUD for users.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Patient Intake",
    "description": "Project for onboarding and intake workflows.",
    "help_text": "Shared intake project for front-desk staff.",
    "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
    "status": "draft",
    "sub_projects": [],
    "forms": [],
    "tags": [
        "intake",
        "patient"
    ],
    "triggers": []
}

request.description: Create a project container before creating forms.
List projects for current org.
Fetch project details.
Update project metadata.
Soft delete a project.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Patient Intake Form",
    "slug": "patient-intake-form",
    "description": "Initial project form.",
    "help_text": "Collect patient information.",
    "status": "draft",
    "ui_type": "flex",
    "supported_languages": [
        "en",
        "hi"
    ],
    "default_language": "en",
    "tags": [
        "intake"
    ],
    "is_public": false,
    "is_template": false,
    "sections": []
}

request.description: Preferred way to create a form.

item.name: 3. Building a Form

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Patient Intake Form",
    "slug": "patient-intake-form",
    "description": "Collect patient information.",
    "help_text": "Initial intake form.",
    "status": "draft",
    "ui_type": "flex",
    "supported_languages": [
        "en",
        "hi"
    ],
    "default_language": "en",
    "tags": [
        "intake"
    ],
    "is_public": false,
    "is_template": false,
    "sections": []
}

request.description: Creates a draft form. Include project to attach it to a project, or use /projects/:project_id/forms for the preferred flow.
Returns all non-deleted forms in your org. Add ?is_template=true for templates only.
Full form document with versions, sections, questions, status. Add ?lang=hi for translated labels.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Patient Intake Form v2",
    "slug": "patient-intake-form",
    "description": "Updated intake form description.",
    "help_text": "Updated instructions.",
    "status": "draft",
    "ui_type": "flex",
    "supported_languages": [
        "en",
        "hi"
    ],
    "default_language": "en",
    "tags": [
        "intake",
        "updated"
    ],
    "is_public": false,
    "is_template": false
}

request.description: Partial update — only include fields to change.

Add a section with questions.

field_type values: text, textarea, number, date, time, datetime, email, phone, radio, select, checkbox, boolean, rating, file_upload, signature, calculated

Save from response: section_id, question ids
Returns all sections with questions in order.
Update section title or questions.
Removes section and all questions from the form.
Import a full form structure including sections. title and slug are required.
Creates a copy as new draft. Returns 202 with task_id. Poll GET /forms/ to find the new form.
Soft-deletes. Excluded from all queries but not removed from DB.

item.description: Create → Add Sections → Add Questions. Must have at least one section before publishing.

item.name: 4. Publishing & Lifecycle

request.description:
Returns 202 (async Celery task). Poll GET /forms/:form_id until status='published'.

minor=true → 1.0 to 1.1 (default)
major=true → 1.1 to 2.0 (use when questions change significantly)
Stops new submissions. Status → 'archived'.
Re-activates archived form. Status → 'published'.
Flips is_public. Only public+published forms accept anonymous submissions.
After expires_at, submissions return 400. Admin only.
Removes expiry so form accepts submissions indefinitely.
Returns a shareable link.
Change URL-friendly identifier. Must be unique per org.

item.description: Publish the form before it accepts submissions. Then manage its lifecycle.

item.name: 5. Form Templates & Custom Fields

request.description: Lists form templates you own or edit.
Returns a single template.
Custom field templates library.
Creates a reusable field definition.

item.description: Reusable form templates and custom field definitions.

item.name: 6. Form Permissions

request.description: Returns editors, viewers, submitters arrays. Requires form:edit permission.

Partial update — only include lists to change.
editors: can edit + view responses
viewers: view-only
submitters: explicitly allowed to submit (leave empty for open access to all org members)

item.description: Grant or restrict access at the user level. Call after form creation.

item.name: 7. File Uploads

request.description:
Multipart form-data. Include file as 'file' field.

Save returned url → use as question value in submission.
Base64-encoded PNG. Returns url → use as value for signature question in submission.
Serve stored file. JWT required for private forms. No auth for public forms.

item.description: Upload files before or during submission. Returned URL goes into submission data.

item.name: 8. Submitting Responses

request.description:
Requires JWT. Form must be published, not expired. User needs submit permission.

Data structure: data[section_id][question_id] = value

For repeatable sections: data[section_id] = [{question_id: value}, ...]

Returns: data.response_id → save as {{response_id}}

No JWT required. Form must be published + is_public=true + not expired.

submitted_by is set to 'anonymous'.
Evaluate show/hide conditions before submission. Returns true/false per condition.

item.description: Submit responses to published forms. Form must be published and not expired.

item.name: 9. Viewing & Querying Responses

request.description: Paginated list of responses. Requires view_responses permission (editor or viewer).
Find all submissions where a question had a specific value. Useful for longitudinal patient tracking.
Rendered HTML. No auth. Only works for is_public=true forms.
Returns cross-form access policy.
Allow cross-form queries from other forms. Requires manage_access permission.
Fetch responses from another form matching a question value.
Returns list of questions used across all responses.
Check which workflows are triggered for a response. Omit response_id to list all active workflows for the form.

item.description: View, filter, and search responses. Requires view_responses permission.

item.name: 10. Per-Form Analytics

request.description: Total responses, status breakdown (submitted/draft), last submission timestamp.
Daily submission counts over N days. Default: 30 days.
Answer counts for choice-type questions (radio, select, checkbox, rating, boolean).

Combined: totalSubmissions, trends (last 7 days), fieldDistributions.

WARNING: completionRate is hardcoded to 0.85 — do not use for reporting.

item.description: Analytics per form. Requires form:view permission.

item.name: 11. Export

request.description: Streaming CSV. All responses, no pagination. Rate-limited: 5 per hour.
Streaming JSON array. Rate-limited: 5 per hour.
Returns 202 with job_id. Use 11.4 to poll status.
Poll until status='completed', then download from returned URL.
DESTRUCTIVE. Soft-deletes all responses for a form. confirm='DELETE_ALL' required. Admin only.

item.description: Download response data as CSV or JSON. Rate-limited.

item.name: 12. AI Summarization & NLP Search

request.description:
Returns Server-Sent Events (SSE). Set Accept: text/event-stream.

Events: {token: '...'} per token, {done: true} when complete.
Semantic NLP search across form responses. SSE stream of matching results.
Previous NLP search queries by the current user.
STUB — placeholder only. Not implemented.

item.description: LLM summarization and semantic search via SSE streaming.

item.name: 13. Translations

request.description: Returns supported target languages for AI translation.
Translation jobs for a form.

Triggers async Celery translation. Returns 202 with job_id.

Save: data.job_id → {{job_id}}
Poll until status='completed'. Then use 13.5.
Returns translated labels and options for all questions.
Quick preview of a single string translation.
Cancel a pending or in-progress job.
Add ?lang=hi to receive field labels in the target language.

item.description: AI-powered form translation. Create job → poll status → fetch content.

item.name: 14. Dashboards

request.description:
Creates a dashboard. Widget data is resolved live on GET.

Save: data.dashboard_id → {{dashboard_id}}, data.slug → {{dashboard_slug}}
Returns dashboard with live widget data from MongoDB aggregation. Uses slug, not ID.
Update dashboard configuration.
Soft-deletes.

item.description: Create and manage dashboards with live widget aggregation.

item.name: 14b. Dashboard Settings & Layout

request.description: Returns theme, language, timezone, layout_config for current user.
Update display preferences.
Resets to: theme=system, language=en, timezone=UTC, layout_config={}.
Catalog of available widget types.
Update a widget's position, size, or visibility.
Remove widget from dashboard.
Drag-and-drop reorder. Send all changed positions at once.
Update grid layout parameters.

item.description: Per-user preferences and widget layout management.

item.name: 15. Approval Workflows

request.description:
Creates workflow tied to trigger_form_id. All queries are org-scoped.

Save: data.id → {{workflow_id}}
Filter by trigger_form_id. Org-scoped.
STUB — returns empty list always.
Soft-deletes.

item.description: Multi-step approval workflows triggered by form submissions.

item.name: 16. Webhooks

request.description:
Requires manager role. Fires webhook and returns delivery result.

Save: delivery id → {{webhook_id}}

item.description: Configure and test HTTP webhook delivery for form events.

item.name: 17. Form Event Hooks

request.description: Runs all hooks for a question. Returns {results: [...]} with each hook outcome.
Registers hook in 'pending' state. Requires admin approval via 17.6.
Requires approve_hooks permission. status='approved' or 'rejected'.

item.description: Synchronous programmatic hooks at question/section/form level.

item.name: 18. System Analytics

request.description: Cross-form metrics. Requires manager role.
Admin-level summary. Requires admin or superadmin.
STUB — returns empty trends array.
Real submission trends from OLAP engine. Requires admin.
Consumer lag, DLQ sizes, stream lengths. Requires superadmin.

item.description: Org-wide and system-wide analytics. Role-restricted.

item.name: 19. SMS Gateway

request.description: Rate-limited: 10 per minute. Requires manager role.
Rate-limited: 5 per minute. Requires admin role.

item.description: AIIMS SMS API wrapper. Role and rate restricted.

item.name: 20. External API (Stubs)

request.description: STUB — returns empty data. Placeholder for UHID lookup.
STUB — returns empty data. Placeholder for employee directory.
STUB — returns success without sending.
STUB — returns success without sending. Different from /sms/ (real AIIMS gateway).

item.description: Placeholder endpoints for future external system integration. All return empty data.

item.name: 21. Admin Operations

request.description: Returns global system config. Requires admin or superadmin.
Update system-wide config. Requires admin or superadmin.
Returns ALL .env key/value pairs including secrets. SUPERADMIN ONLY.
Updates .env file. Most changes require container restart. SUPERADMIN ONLY.

item.description: System-wide configuration. Requires admin or superadmin.

item.name: 99. Cleanup & Security Test
item.description: Logout and Session Revocation test. MUST RUN LAST.
